div1.entryFree: Puny (cf. Puisny) little, petty: p. lies, Merch. III, 4, 74. a p. subject strikes at thy great glory, R2 III, 2, 86. my p. drawer, H4A II, 4, 33. his p. sword, H6A IV, 7, 36. that thy wives with spits and boys with stones in p. battle slay me, Cor. IV, 4, 6. every p. whipster gets my sword, Oth. V, 2, 244.
